steps.title: Backsolving — testing choice B (76/9)
steps.content:
Compute g(18): $$g(18) = \frac{8}{9}\cdot 18 - \frac{4}{9} = \frac{144}{9} - \frac{4}{9} = \frac{140}{9}$$.
Compare to choice B value $$\frac{76}{9}$$ – they are not equal, so choice B fails.

steps.title: Backsolving — testing choice C (140/9)
steps.content:
As computed, $$g(18) = \frac{140}{9}$$.
This equals choice C value $$\frac{140}{9}$$.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
